name: Claim denied after warehouse fall in Saint George, what now?
description: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days; get evidence together.[2]

mainEntity.name: Claim denied after warehouse fall in Saint George, what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Labor Commission within 20 days; get evidence together.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Request reasons in writing, then appeal to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of denial notice.[2] Common denials: late report or non-work related.[1] Key factors: Gather more evidence like witnesses/medical; check 21-day decision timeline. Practical guidance: Contact Industrial Accidents Division (801) 530-6800 for help; don't sign denials. Hire attorney experienced in appeals. Many denials overturned with proper docs.[2]
